description: CompositionRed and white printed kurta that has floral print towards the hem with a faded look, made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves, V-neck with red piping that extends onto the chest placket and split side hemsFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this faded print, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose white kameez and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
